CVE-2026-40385.title: In libexif through 0.6.25, an unsigned 32bit integer overflow in  ...
CVE-2026-40385.description: In libexif through 0.6.25, an unsigned 32bit integer overflow in Nikon MakerNote handling could be used by local attackers to cause crashes or information leaks. This only affects 32bit systems.

CVE-2026-40386.title: In libexif through 0.6.25, an integer underflow in size checking  ...
CVE-2026-40386.description: In libexif through 0.6.25, an integer underflow in size checking for Fuji and Olympus MakerNote decoding could be used by attackers to crash or leak information out of libexif-using programs.
